name: Abdullah ibn Abbas ibn Ali
title: Loyal Son
shortDescription: One of the brave sons of Hazrat Abbas (AS) whose name shines among the martyrs of Karbala.
fullStory:
Abdullah ibn Abbas ibn Ali (AS) is another devoted son of Karbala's standard-bearer, Hazrat Abu al-Fadl (AS), whose name is mentioned among the martyrs of the Ashura event in some historical books.

Hazrat Abbas (AS), who was himself devoted to Wilayah, had brought all his family members to Karbala to assist his brother Hussain (AS). Abdullah, having learned Hashemite zeal and loyalty from his father, did not sit idle on Ashura.

When the situation grew dire for the Ahl al-Bayt's caravan and the Hashemite youths went to the battlefield one after another, Abdullah also bravely entered the field and engaged Ibn Ziyad's soldiers.

He fought with all his might until, defending the Imam of his time and the elevation of truth, he became the target of enemy arrows and swords, achieving the elevated status of martyrdom.
quoteArabic: وَمِنْ وُلْدِ العَبّاسِ: عَبْدُاللَّهِ وَالقاسِمُ وَمُحَمَّدٌ...
quote: (In historical sources:) And from the sons of Abbas: Abdullah, Qasim, and Muhammad were martyred in Karbala.
source: Manaqib Al Abi Talib, Ibn Shahr Ashub
